scores.notes: OCR output has significant issues: misspellings (e.g., 'Medja' for 'Media'), garbled text (e.g., 'erat', 'wes/tae'), missing sections (e.g., 'Key Details', 'Insights'), incorrect numeric values (e.g., '156.7' instead of '60.6'), and poor layout preservation. Major content is missing or distorted.
